title: Resource Pack Toggler
description: Lets you toggle multiple resource packs on and off with a single keypress.
body:
This mod lets you toggle multiple resource packs on and off with a single keypress. Perfect for players who frequently switch between different textures or want a quick way to enable a specific packs without digging through the menu.

# ❓ Q&A

**Q: How do I configure which packs get toggled?**

A: Open the Mods menu, find Resource Pack Toggler, and click the Config button. You can add packs manually or use the "Detect Available Packs" button to find them automatically.

**Q: How do I toggle the packs?**

A: Press F6 in-game. The key can be changed in Options → Controls → Resource Pack Toggler.

**Q: Do the packs toggle one at a time or all together?**

A: All configured packs toggle as a group. one press enables them all, another press disables them all.

**Q: Can I add any resource pack?**

A: Yes! As long as the pack is installed in your resourcepacks folder, you can add it to the toggle list.

**Q: Will this work on servers?**

A: Yes! Since this mod is client-side only, it works on any server, vanilla or modded, without needing to be installed on the server.

## 📈 Supported Versions


1.20.1 - **SUPPORTED**
